head.b:skin: /* ====================================== Version: 1.0.0 Nama: Spare (Waktu Luang) Modifikasi Terakhir: 07 Mei 2026 Deskripsi: Carpe diem, quam minimum credula postero. License: MIT License Kontributor: Anggi Pratama (igonafaith) Source: https://github.com/igonafaith/spare ====================================== */ /* Variable definitions ==================== <Variable name="bg" description="Page Background" type="color" default="#FBFBFD" value="#FBFBFD"/> <Variable name="surface" description="Surface" type="color" default="#FFFFFF" value="#FFFFFF"/> <Variable name="surfaceHover" description="Surface Hover" type="color" default="#F4F7FB" value="#F4F7FB"/> <Variable name="text" description="Text Color" type="color" default="#1A1D23" value="#1A1D23"/> <Variable name="textMuted" description="Muted Text" type="color" default="#6B7280" value="#6B7280"/> <Variable name="textLight" description="Light Text" type="color" default="#9CA3AF" value="#9CA3AF"/> <Variable name="blue" description="Primary" type="color" default="#2563EB" value="#2563EB"/> <Variable name="blueLight" description="Primary Light" type="color" default="#DBEAFE" value="#DBEAFE"/> <Variable name="blueDark" description="Primary Dark" type="color" default="#1D4ED8" value="#1D4ED8"/> <Variable name="border" description="Border" type="color" default="#E8ECF1" value="#E8ECF1"/> <Variable name="borderLight" description="Border Light" type="color" default="#F0F2F5" value="#F0F2F5"/> */

div.p: Sepertinya halaman yang kamu cari sudah berpindah, dihapus, atau tautannya tidak benar.

b:eval.expr: data:blog.metaDescription ?: "Carpe diem, quam minimum credula postero."
